item_name: Set up an aquarium for a goldfish
prompt:
A large rectangular glass aquarium of about 150 liters (roughly 40 gallons) on a sturdy stand in a bright living room, clearly much wider and taller than a human’s upper body would be if they stood next to it. The tank is long, with lots of horizontal swimming space, and filled with clean water nearly to the top. Inside are one or two healthy goldfish, smooth river stones, live aquatic plants, and a powerful hang-on-back filter and heater on the back wall, emphasizing that this is a big, serious goldfish setup, not a tiny desktop tank.

Near-future solarpunk interior with soft natural light from a window, other houseplants nearby, and simple eco-friendly décor in the background. Photorealistic 512×512 image with no brand logos and no legible text. If any human is visible, only show a partial arm or torso that makes the aquarium’s size obvious by comparison—the tank should look heavy and substantial, clearly too large to be a 5 or 10 gallon aquarium.
